scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && npx esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/_worker.js --platform=neutral --target=es2022 --conditions=worker,browser && cp static/index.html dist/index.html
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=ayaya-playlist
scripts.db:reset_password: wrangler d1 execute ayaya_playlist --remote --command="DELETE FROM auth;"
